field.provenance: The exact Run-2 generated field plus its fielded original; generation was skipped so the run isolated judge execution policy.

verdict.notes: Every persisted sidecar reported worldcup-judge and no ordinary tools ran. Judge requests fell 15.6%, logical input fell 84.9%, and 5x-output input-equivalent cost fell 25.7%. The cumulative Claude session limit was reached late in the run; 157 invocations did not produce StructuredOutput and 37 zero-usage tiebreaks were scheduled, so the champion/trust result is not quality evidence.
